converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Erling D. Solberg papers
Solberg, Erling D., 1902-
3172
8 cubic feet. 8 cubic feet.
[ca. 1942-1970] Publications, speeches, correspondence, and research notes. Publications, speeches, correspondence, and related research notes of Erling D. Solberg, a land economist. Collection material in English 3920059
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Martin Heggestad
Date completed:
July 2004
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, July 2004
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, August 2015
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Member, International Fraternity of Lambda Alpha, George Washington Chapter.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Publications, speeches, correspondence, and related research notes of Erling D. Solberg, a land economist.
RELATED MATERIALS
Part of Lambda Alpha Literary Archives.
Cite As:
Erling D. Solberg papers, #3172. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Real property -- Economic aspects. Land use -- Economic aspects. Lambda Alpha International. George Washington Chapter
